description: Universal hooks included with the DOE Starter Kit — these are already in .claude/settings.json and .githooks/. This file documents them as a reference.

claude_code_hooks.description: PreToolUse hooks in .claude/settings.json — active by default

git_hooks.description: Git hooks in .githooks/ — activate with: git config core.hooksPath .githooks
git_hooks.pre-commit: Runs python3 execution/audit_claims.py --hook if the script exists. Blocks commit on FAIL.
git_hooks.commit-msg: Strips AI co-author trailers (Co-Authored-By lines mentioning Claude/AI) from commit messages.
